textPlain: Tigerbeetle is a fault tolerant database that’s used for finances and time series stuff. It’s a field that has very particular requirements around this sort of thing.(not a tiger beetle user so I’d love to also see some more context for this)
Looks nice, but... what is this and how is it supposed to work?! There is no explanation, no tutorial, ...

I found this, which looks like it's for an earlier version: https://tigerbeetle.com/blog/2023-07-11-we-put-a-distributed...My eyes kind of glaze over as I read this but maybe it will be more helpful to you.
